items.title: Cascade raises $3.5M to help construction firms find and win projects
items.summary: a16z Speedrun, Ada Ventures, and Snowball VC have invested in Cascade's $3.5 million seed round.

items.title: The browser wars aren’t about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari
items.summary: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

items.title: Passionfroot raises $15M to expand its B2B creator marketplace to the US
items.summary: Passionfroot, a German startup building a marketplace connecting B2B creators with brands, has raised $15M in a Series A round led by Insight Partners.

items.title: WhatsApp adds Apple CarPlay and Android Auto upgrades, iPad sign-ups, and more
items.summary: WhatsApp on Apple CarPlay and Android Auto will let users hear and reply to messages, make calls, view their call history, and access favorite contacts hands-free and right from their car's screen.

items.title: Glow emerges from stealth at $1.2B valuation to challenge endpoint security in the AI era
items.summary: Glow is targeting a new class of endpoint risks created by the rapid adoption of AI agents and developer tools inside enterprises.

items.title: Synthesia’s AI training platform is moving beyond videos into live coaching
items.summary: Synthesia launched AI Roleplay Sessions, an interactive enterprise training platform where employees practice workplace conversations with AI avatars that provide feedback, scoring, and analytics to h...

items.title: The Anthropic-Physical Intelligence rumor roiling AI Twitter
items.summary: Anthropic and OpenAI's aggressive 2026 acquisition sprees set the stage for a weekend rumor.

items.title: Dimension Capital’s $800M third fund shows the intersection of science and compute is booming
items.summary: The four-year-old firm's latest fund is 60% larger than its second vehicle announced 18 months ago.

items.title: Meta is testing an AI bedtime story app for people with no imagination
items.summary: At last, a tech company has found a way to outsource humanity's oldest pastime: using our imaginations.

items.title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
items.summary: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and ex...

items.title: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its pre-release models
items.summary: OpenAI has come forward to claim responsibility for the Hugging Face breach, saying it was the result of internal testing gone awry.

items.title: Jack Dorsey is taking on Slack with Buzz, a group chat platform for teams and their AI agents
items.summary: Buzz is a group chat platform for the workplace that puts humans and their AI agents in the same conversation.

items.title: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app
items.summary: Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks. Now, as AI makes it easier to create, organize, and recommend content, t...

items.title: Bucking EV slowdown, Sila raises $300M to expand battery materials factory
items.summary: Sila's fresh $300 million round will help it make enough of its silicon-carbon anode material to power more than 100,000 EVs.

items.title: Einride bets $38M on EV charging as it scales electric trucking
items.summary: The acquisition — Einride's first as a publicly traded company — will expand its EV-charging ecosystem as it works to scale its electric trucking business.

items.title: Apple teams up with Klarna to launch a lease-to-own program for iPhones, iPads, and Macs
items.summary: The new leasing program is a big change for the hardware company, and comes as it looks to raise prices on many of its products.

items.title: Data centers expected to use 4x more electricity by 2035
items.summary: New data centers built through 2033 could consume as much electricity as India uses today.

items.title: Tesla spins up robotaxi pilots in Orlando and Tampa ahead of Q2 earnings
items.summary: The company didn't say how many are in each city and has taken a far more cautious approach to scaling the network than CEO Elon Musk had promised.

items.title: Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro
items.summary: Google released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and Flash Cyber, but the continued absence of Gemini 3.5 Pro raises fresh questions about its AI strategy.

items.title: Instagram now lets you swap out the music in your old posts
items.summary: With the new "Replace Audio" tool, users can update the music on their post at any time while keeping the post's existing likes, comments, shares, and reach intact.
